/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/reader.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/global-variables.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/reader/reader.cpp.o -o reader  /usr/lib/libgtkmm-4.0.so /usr/lib/libpangomm-2.48.so /usr/lib/libgiomm-2.68.so /usr/lib/libglibmm-2.68.so /usr/lib/libcairomm-1.16.so /usr/lib/libsigc-3.0.so /usr/lib/libgtk-4.so /usr/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/libcairo.so /usr/lib/libgraphene-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libvulkan.so
